mapper.select: SELECT * FROM medical_record_home WHERE record_id = #{recordId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE medical_record_home SET status = #{status}, audit_user_id = #{auditUserId}, audit_user_name = #{auditUserName}, audit_time = #{auditTime}, audit_remark = #{auditRemark}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
